verdict: Ad spend is leaking; Google Business Profile is the bright spot carrying real customer demand.
diagnosis: Instagram ads cost $459 per lead this period — roughly 3x the home services benchmark, with zero tracked revenue in the pipeline.

signals.headline: 9 leads from $4,129 spend
signals.detail: Instagram campaign produced just 9 leads in 28 days. Cost per lead landed near $459 — well above industry norms.

signals.headline: 33 calls from Google Profile
signals.detail: Google Business Profile drove 33 call clicks and 59 direction requests. This is the channel actually generating customer contact.

signals.headline: 12 new 5-star reviews this period
signals.detail: Reviews keep flowing in at a perfect 5-star average. This is a competitive moat most local rivals do not have.

signals.headline: 0 dollars tracked in pipeline
signals.detail: Opportunity monetary value reads zero across all open deals. Sales outcomes are not being logged, so true return is invisible.

signals.headline: 121 link clicks from 131,684 views
signals.detail: Click-through on the ad is thin. The creative is reaching people but not compelling them to take the next step.

benchmark.label: BENCHMARK
benchmark.subheader: HVAC cost per lead sits near $100-$229
benchmark.body: Industry data for 2026 puts blended HVAC cost per lead between $100 and $229, with Google Local Services Ads as low as $25-$75. This account is running roughly 3x that range.

seasonal.label: SEASONAL
seasonal.subheader: Peak AC replacement demand window now
seasonal.body: 19% of homeowners are weighing new heating or cooling systems in 2026, with cooling season search intent peaking June through August. Demand timing favors aggressive booking, not just awareness.

competitor.label: CATEGORY
competitor.body: 78% of home services customers hire the first company that responds. Five-minute response time can lift conversion by 391%. Most competitors take days, leaving an opening.

recommendations.title: Test Google Local Services Ads alongside Instagram
recommendations.detail: Consider shifting part of the Instagram budget into Google Local Services Ads. Benchmark cost per lead runs $25-$75 there, versus $459 currently. The 5-star review base should rank well.

recommendations.title: Fix pipeline tracking before adding more spend
recommendations.detail: Worth logging actual job value against each lead source. Without revenue tracking, there is no way to prove which channel is profitable. This blocks every other decision.

recommendations.title: Refresh the ad creative and offer
recommendations.detail: Test a new static or short video with a sharper hook — free tune-up, financing, or same-day service. Current creative drew 928 clicks but only 9 leads.
